red_action: R-d1-القوات-025: Held in reserve — preserving naval surface assets for follow-on operations per operational tempo doctrine.
red_why: Blue's force ratio is favorable, but maintaining a strong naval presence ensures flexibility and readiness for subsequent phases. [refs: AJP-3.1 Ed B §4-2]
combined_effect: Local model fallback used after invalid adjudicator output. No additional combat effects were applied this phase.

red_action: R-d3-12-008: Conduct a SEAD (Suppression of Enemy Air Defense) mission targeting Blue's coastal radars and air defense systems.
red_why: Prevent Blue from effectively engaging Red forces during the amphibious assault, ensuring air superiority for landings. [refs: FM 3-09 §4-6]
blue_action: B-d1-2-013: Conduct a counter-SHAD mission against Red's SEAD efforts, targeting their UAVs and radars.
blue_why: Per FM 3-90 air defense doctrine, engage enemy air defense systems to protect friendly C2 networks and reduce the effectiveness of Red's SEAD operations. [refs: FM 3-90]

red_action: R-d1-8-080: Deploy USVs to lay additional minefields in key areas, enhancing the defensive barrier.
red_why: Increase Blue's minefield complexity and reduce their ability to safely navigate through the landing zones. [refs: AJP-3.1 Ed B §5-4]
blue_action: B-d1-2-013: Deploy air-launched USVs to counter Red's USV minefield laying efforts, ensuring the defensive barrier remains intact.
blue_why: Per ADP 3-90, use mobile air assets to counter enemy maritime threats and maintain control of key areas. [refs: ADP 3-90]

red_action: R-d1-21-073: Insert a reconnaissance team to gather intelligence on Blue's coastal defenses and minefield layout.
red_why: Provide critical information for the amphibious assault, enabling Red forces to exploit any weaknesses in Blue's defense. [refs: FM 3-05.17 §2-4]

red_action: R-d0-500-077: Maintain continuous electronic warfare against Blue's C2 networks to disrupt their command and control.
red_why: Persistent EW ensures Red forces can operate with minimal interference from Blue's communications, enhancing operational tempo. [refs: AJP-3.1 Ed B §6-2]
blue_action: B-d1-501-014: Engage Red's EW efforts with counter-electronic warfare measures, disrupting their C2 networks and reducing their operational tempo.
blue_why: Per ATP 3-01.8, use electronic warfare to degrade enemy command and control capabilities, forcing them into a less coordinated engagement pattern. [refs: ATP 3-01.8]
